title: What's in the US-Iran agreement?
summary_full: The 14-paragraph memo includes an end to fighting, an agreement that Iran will never have a nuclear weapon, and a $300bn redevelopment package for Iran.
summary_public: The 14-paragraph memo includes an end to fighting, an agreement that Iran will never have a nuclear weapon, and a $300bn redevelopment package for Iran.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: agreement that Iran will never have a nuclear weapon
